titleStmt.title: Zheng Xi bei shi wen (explication of the Zheng Wengong steles) (rubbing)
鄭羲碑釋文 / 滎陽鄭文公上下兩碑（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Zheng Xi bei shi wen (explication of the Zheng Wengong steles). RELATED, not the inscription itself. Useful apparatus: a 19th-c. transcription/commentary on Zheng Daozhao's Zheng Wengong shang/xia bei. Confirms Berkeley holds material on both the upper AND lower Zheng Wengong steles. UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection (Hsin812).

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: 1877 (Qing). NOT a rubbing of the Northern Wei stone — a later printed/transcribed 釋文 (explication) of the upper and lower Zheng Wengong steles (滎陽鄭文公上下兩碑).

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
